# COMPASS metabolic flux analysis dependencies
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# NOTE: COMPASS requires IBM CPLEX (commercial solver) as a system dependency.
# See: https://github.com/YosefLab/Compass

# Core dependencies
scanpy>=1.9.0
anndata>=0.8.0
numpy>=1.20.0
pandas>=1.5.0
matplotlib>=3.5.0
seaborn>=0.11.0
statsmodels>=0.13.0

# COMPASS (install from PyPI or GitHub)
compass-sc

# Added after code review: dependencies used in core_analysis.py
plotly>=5.0.0
pybiomart>=0.2.0
scipy>=1.7.0
